name: Lisa Whitley
description: I had a great experience with Pete. He cleaned our air ducts. Very timely, excellent communication & availability. I would absolutely use him again for any of the services he offers. Reasonable price too!

name: Marlyn Flanders
description: I had the most extraordinary service with Mercy carpet cleaning service. I would recommend the owners 100% to all friends and family who are looking for pure perfectionist. Thanks Mercy carpet service for your extraordinary work.

name: Amy Tucker
description: I cannot say enough positive things about Lesia and her team! She helped me and my client last minute and was able to clean a 5,124 SF building (interior and exterior) in one day. They worked so hard. This building had a break in and the property was nearly destroyed. I've posted one before and after just to give everyone an example of their tremendous work. My partners and I will use Lesia and her team for all our commercial building cleaning needs going forward. I highly recommend everyone do the same!

name: Alison Jordan
description: Efficient, quick, and friendly! They responded immediately and set up a time that would work for our house listing. We had several pet stains that had been there awhile and we were unsure if they would come out. Our carpets have never looked this clean (nor this color) in the 4 years we have been here. HIGHLY recommend this company!

name: Clement Bowman
description: Thanks to Pete and Shawn of Mercy Carpet for putting life in my hardwood floors. They gave my floors a deep cleaning and gave my hardwood floors the natural shine once again. Professional service with professional advice on how to keep them looking new. Thanks once again Pete and Shawn for your service.

name: Beth Jackson
description: We love using Mercy Carpet Cleaning & Restoration. We have been using them to clean our carpets and furniture for over 3 years now. They do an excellent job, make great recommendations, and always do a phenomenal job. Their prices are very reasonable and I would highly recommend them!

name: Bryce Brodrick
description: I am extremely pleased with Mercy Carpet Cleaning! We have three messy boys who, over the years, have stained our white carpet with food, drinks, science experiments, slime, and who knows what else?! I didn't think the carpet would ever look brand new again, but after Lesia left, the carpet is back to white and spotless. She cleaned in half the time I thought it would take, and the carpet dried quickly. Lesia's customer service is excellent. She immediately made me feel like a friend instead of just a client.

name: Sarah Simpson
description: I am so pleased with my experience with Mercy Carpet Cleaning. Our carpets had some really rough stains on them from kids, and they look great now. Lesia in the office was very nice and made the whole process very simple. I will definitely use Mercy again for my future cleaning needs.

name: Stephanie Kithcart
description: Pete cleaned all of our carpets today! They had pet and kid stains and were in bad shape! Pete did an amazing job and we are planning to schedule routine cleanings with Mercy! He also taught us how to take better care of the carpets in the meantime! His expertise and professionalism were wonderful! I highly recommend Mercy Carpet Cleaning!

name: Susan Hobbs
description: We just had Mercy Carpet clean carpet in 2 rooms of our home today and we are very pleased! From getting an estimate and scheduling with Lesia, to Pete doing the cleaning, the experience was fast and easy. We are very pleased with the results, plus knowing they are using an extra sanitizing process to help eliminate germs and viruses was a bonus! We definitely recommend them and will use them again when needed.
